name_en: Exclusive Launch Model: M44797 Leather is from the authentic factory in Italy Grade A (Premium Authentic): The so-called premium authenticity lies in quality, hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, stitching, Grade A output, detail quality control, professional QC quality control, complete authentic packaging, product photos match the actual product, full packaging as shown. Dimensions: 20x16x7.5CM🌟
